'''''Stalwart''''' was a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] in the service of the [[Imperial Remnant]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Starfleet]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

==History==
At the time of the [[Battle of Bastion]], ''Stalwart'' was stationed as part of the defenses of [[Yaga Minor/Legends|Yaga Minor]], under the command of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kurlen Flennic]]. Assuming [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] to have [[Death/Legends|perished]] in the battle, Flennic attempted to take command of the Empire using ''Stalwart'' as his [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], but was forced to surrender her when Pellaeon emerged alive, albeit wounded and in a [[Bacta tank/Legends|bacta tank]], both of which were unknown to Flennic.<ref name="Remnant" />

''Stalwart'' participated in the tactical withdrawal from Yaga Minor to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Borosk/Legends|Borosk]], where it was tasked with leading [[Fleet Group Stalwart|Fleet Group ''Stalwart'']], one of four temporary battlegroups created for the defense of the planet. During the [[Battle of Borosk (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Borosk]], ''Stalwart'', along with [[Protector (Victory II-class)|''Protector'']] sustained heavy damage. At the conclusion of the battle, ''Stalwart'' remained in-system to lead the "mopping-up" efforts against the remains of the retreating [[Yuuzhan Vong]] fleet.<ref name="Remnant" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Stalwart'' appeared in ''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'', a [[2003]] novel written by [[Sean Williams]] and [[Shane Dix]] as the fifteenth entry in the ''[[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order]]'' series.<ref name="Remnant" />

*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' {{1st}}
